_comment: phone-ping: one push per prompt-cycle, only for interactive Desktop sessions. Merge these FOUR hook entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json under the top-level 'hooks' key. Replace <USER> with your Windows username. All four call the same ping_notify.ps1, which dispatches on the hook event: UserPromptSubmit resets the per-cycle gate (never pings) - PreToolUse/AskUserQuestion -> 'Claude has a question' - Notification/idle_prompt -> 'Claude is waiting' - Stop -> 'Claude is done'. The script self-gates: it skips headless/scheduled/SDK runs (anything launched from a Temp dir or a non-Desktop entrypoint) and sends at most one ping per prompt-cycle per session. If you already have other PreToolUse/UserPromptSubmit/Stop entries (linting, guards), ADD these objects to those arrays - do not overwrite them. The Notification matcher 'idle_prompt' targets the idle case; ping_notify.ps1 also filters notification_type internally, so an empty matcher ('') works too.
